provisions.content:
RETIREMENT PENSIONS (CROSS-BORDER ACTIVITIES
AND CROSS-BORDER TRANSFERS)

[ L.S.514.08

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 514.08
REGOLAMENTI DWAR RETIREMENT PENSIONS
(CROSS-BORDER ACTIVITIES AND CROSSBORDER TRANSFERS)
4 ta’ Marzu, 2020

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 48 tal-2020, kif emendati bl-Avviż Legali 260 tal2021.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
